hero.subtitle: International migration, cross-border legal strategy, and Argentine legal representation — all in one place.
hero.subtitleAlt: Comprehensive legal support for individuals, families, and businesses navigating international transitions.
hero.servicesHint: Click and scroll down to explore

whoWeAre.title: Two Sisters, One Shared Vision
whoWeAre.paragraph1: Founded by two sisters “Las Hermanas Galli”, and attorneys with over 15 years of combined professional experience and hundreds of successful cases, Together, we combine international mobility strategy with deep Argentine legal knowledge to provide comprehensive, solution oriented support for individuals, families, and businesses navigating legal and international transitions.
whoWeAre.paragraph2: Having personally experienced the process of living and navigating legal systems abroad, one of us understands firsthand the uncertainty, challenges, and emotions that often come with building a life in another country. Her practice focuses on international migration, global mobility, and cross-border legal matters.
whoWeAre.paragraph3: The other, after graduating with honors, has developed her career across both the public and private legal sectors in Argentina, including experience within the Superior Provincial Court of Córdoba as a relatora, contributing directly to the drafting and development of judicial decisions. Her background provides the strong domestic legal and litigation expertise often essential in complex international matters.
whoWeAre.paragraph4: Together, we combine international mobility strategy with deep Argentine legal knowledge to provide comprehensive, solution-oriented support for individuals, families, and businesses navigating legal and international transitions.

sisters.name: I. Galli
sisters.summary: Attorney with a background in civil, business, and family law. Graduated from the School of Law at the National University of Córdoba at 23, recognized as an outstanding graduate and placed on the Law School's Honor Roll.
sisters.bio: Attorney with a background in civil, business, and family law. I graduated from the School of Law at the National University of Córdoba at the age of 23, receiving recognition as an outstanding graduate and earning a place on the Law School's Honor Roll. Currently pursuing postgraduate studies, convinced that continuous learning is an essential part of legal practice.
sisters.alt: Portrait of I. Galli, attorney at Galli's & Co.

sisters.name: Victoria Galli
sisters.summary: Argentinian lawyer specialized in international mobility, with a focus on immigration and citizenship frameworks in Argentina, Italy, Spain and other jurisdictions.
sisters.bio: Argentinian lawyer, graduated from the School of Law at the National University of Córdoba at the age of 23, with a specialization in International Mobility and a focus on Argentine, Italian, Spanish, and other immigration and citizenship frameworks. As a proud dual citizen of Argentina and Italy, bringing both personal and professional experience at work.
sisters.alt: Portrait of Victoria Galli, attorney at Galli's & Co.

whoWeAre.networkText: Our interdisciplinary approach also allows us to work alongside a trusted network of specialized legal professionals in Argentina  including Tax, labor, Real Estate, Criminal and corporate law practitioners, as well as partner law firms across Europe and the United States. This collaborative structure enables coordinated, well rounded legal support across multiple jurisdictions and areas of law.
whoWeAre.ofCounselSubtitle: Specialized professionals who collaborate with the firm across jurisdictions.

ofCounsel.name: Mario Tedesco
ofCounsel.bio1: He's a proud Neapolitan (Italian) licensed lawyer, with more than thirty years of legal experience focused on Italian citizenship Iure Sanguinis.
ofCounsel.bio2: He speaks English, Italian, and Spanish and he personally handles these matters representing clients in courts across Italy.

ofCounsel.name: Gian Ignacio Rondi
ofCounsel.bio2: He has spent over 3 years working within the Judicial Branch of the Province of Córdoba and the Public Prosecutor's Office in criminal investigation. He specializes in labor law, workplace accidents, occupational diseases, and criminal defense.

ofCounsel.name: Federico Teliczan
ofCounsel.role: Civil, Business, and Family Law Specialist.
ofCounsel.bio1: Federico Teliczan is an attorney practicing law in the provinces of Córdoba and La Pampa.
ofCounsel.bio2: His practice focuses on Civil, Commercial, Family, and Estate Law. He is a Founding Partner of the T&P Law Firm and a Partner at Martínez Paz & Asociados. His practice encompasses the judicial and extrajudicial representation of individuals and corporations, drafting legal pleadings and lawsuits, structuring contracts and agreements, and providing comprehensive legal counsel in civil, commercial, and family matters.

whyUs.title: Why Clients Choose Us
whyUs.subtitle: Three reasons we are trusted with the cases that other firms consider unsolvable.

items.title: Complementary Expertise
items.description: International migration strategy combined with strong Argentine legal representation.

items.title: Problem-Solving Approach
items.description: We specialize in complex, unconventional, and high-obstacle cases requiring strategic legal solutions.

items.title: One-Stop Legal Support
items.description: From visas and citizenships to litigation and administrative matters, we provide comprehensive legal assistance under one firm.

stepper.title: Strategic legal solutions for your global move.
stepper.subtitle: Four practice areas, one coordinated team. Choose the area that best matches your objective.

services.title: Argentinian residency / citizenship
services.summary: Comprehensive guidance for individuals, families and businesses moving to or operating from Argentina. Strategy, documentation, filings and ongoing support.

services.title: Argentine Legal Representation
services.summary: Litigation, administrative proceedings, civil matters and legal documentation issues — domestic firepower for international cases.

services.title: U.S. Visa Guidance
services.summary: B1/B2 visitor visas, DS-160 preparation, interview strategy and consular guidance — disciplined evidence, clear timelines.

services.title: European Pathways
services.summary: Italian citizenship, residency-by-ancestry, European residency options and document research for complex genealogical cases.

stepper.ctaTitle: Not sure which path is yours?
stepper.ctaText: Book a consultation and we will map jurisdiction, documents and timing together.

complexCases.title: Built for Complex Situations
complexCases.subtitle: International legal matters rarely fit into simple categories. Our firm was designed to handle the legal, administrative, and strategic challenges that arise when lives, families, businesses, and opportunities move across borders.
complexCases.tagline: If it’s complicated, we can resolve it.

process.title: How We Work
process.subtitle: A disciplined four-step method designed to bring clarity, predictability and execution to every international case.

steps.title: Initial Consultation
steps.description: We listen first. A structured conversation to understand the people, the goal and the constraints.

steps.title: Case Evaluation & Strategy
steps.description: We map jurisdictions, risks and routes — and design a clear strategic plan tailored to your situation.

steps.title: Document & Legal Preparation
steps.description: We coordinate documentation, translations, certifications and filings with rigorous internal review.

steps.title: Representation & Ongoing Support
steps.description: We represent you before authorities and stay by your side until the matter is fully resolved.

testimonials.title: Trusted across borders
testimonials.subtitle: A selection of voices behind our practice. Families, professionals and businesses that placed their international transitions in our hands.

items.quote: They guided our family through a citizenship reconstruction that two other firms had told us was impossible. Calm, strategic and human throughout.
items.author: M. Rinaldi

items.quote: Clear, sharp and incredibly responsive. They turned an obstacle-filled visa process into a structured plan with results.
items.author: J. Hernández

items.quote: Their command of Argentine law combined with international experience made all the difference for our cross-border operation.
items.author: K. Müller

finalCta.title: Your International Journey Deserves Strategic Legal Support
finalCta.subtitle: From the first consultation to the final resolution, we stand by your side with international rigor and human understanding.

about.title: About Galli's & Co.
about.intro: A boutique international firm specialized in global mobility and the resolution of complex legal situations. We exist for the cases where strategy, law and human understanding must converge.
about.mission: To make international transitions clearer, safer and more humane — combining legal precision with the empathy of someone who has lived the experience.

values.title: Legal rigor
values.description: Methodical analysis, documented strategy and no shortcuts.

values.title: Human compass
values.description: Behind every file there is a family, a project, a life.

values.title: Discretion
values.description: Senior attention, confidential treatment, boutique standards.

values.title: Global reach
values.description: Argentina, Europe and the United States — coordinated under one firm.

servicesPage.title: Services
servicesPage.intro: Four practice areas, one coordinated team. Each service is delivered by attorneys who specialize in the jurisdiction and the type of case.
servicesPage.ctaSectionText: Tell us about your situation. We will design a clear strategic plan tailored to your objectives.

international-mobility.title: International Mobility
international-mobility.tagline: Argentine residency, citizenship and relocation strategy.
international-mobility.intro: Comprehensive guidance for individuals, families and businesses moving to — or operating from — Argentina. Strategy, documentation, filings and ongoing support.
bullets: Real Estate, Tax and general Legal Support for foreign clients

us-visa-guidance.tagline: Disciplined preparation for U.S. consular processes.
us-visa-guidance.intro: Strategic preparation for visitor visa processes before U.S. consulates, with emphasis on evidence quality, narrative consistency and interview readiness.

european-pathways.tagline: Italian citizenship and European residency strategies.
european-pathways.intro: Eligibility analysis, document research and consular or judicial strategy for Italian citizenship claims and other European residency options.

argentine-legal-representation.title: Argentine Legal Representation
argentine-legal-representation.tagline: Domestic legal firepower for international cases.
argentine-legal-representation.intro: Litigation, administrative proceedings and civil matters before Argentine courts and agencies — often the missing piece in complex international files.

complexCasesPage.title: Complex Cases
complexCasesPage.intro: Our firm was designed for the situations that don’t fit a template — when documents are missing, jurisdictions collide, deadlines are urgent or previous attempts have failed.

contactPage.title: Contact
contactPage.intro: Tell us about your case. We typically reply within one business day.
contactPage.scheduleText: Use the channel you prefer — WhatsApp for a quick exchange, email for detailed materials, or the booking hook below for a short consult.

footer.description: We support migration, civil and tax decisions with legal precision, international perspective and tailored execution.
